arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid XI vs Osasuna – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid travel to Osasuna tonight looking to extend their unbeaten run in La Liga. Diego Simeone’s side are three unbeaten, a run that has included consecutive clean sheets. Third in the table, a win tonight will all but guarantee a top three finish for the 12th time in the last 13 seasons.
